name: Forgotten Trade
desc_clean: Wurmkin 2 Today I found it — my life, given up.
mechanic_summary: Forgotten Trade to Spell klanu Wurmkin. Wurmkin 2 Today I found it — my life, given up. Keywords: brak.
wiki_desc: Wurmkin 2 Today I found it — my life, given up. It's comforting, I suppose, to know that my mind isn't truly lost, but the truth I've found, of mistakes and guilt, are a consolation not suited for the offense. Exiles sacrificed at my behest. Judgement forsaken to save human souls. Titans destroyed by my hand. All ending in the loss of our Realm. As a Titan, a Judge even, I was supposed to make no error, yet I doomed the very ground upon which I walk. What do I know of judgement...
